nodes.label: Overnight Risk Premium

nodes.label: Pairs Trade

nodes.label: Position Sizing

nodes.label: Scaling Out
nodes.summary: Scaling out is a position management technique where a trader exits portions of a profitable position incrementally as the underlying asset moves favorably, rather than closing the entire position at once.
